ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Continued To May-08-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Frangos for and with for Sandra Geogleris and Demetra Pichinos (Administrators).

Mr. Frango reported that he is unable to locate a waiver that Lulu (mother) had signed, but was able to locate twenty five properties that need to be researched and gold in a company that has filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy. Mr. Frango stated that after the taxes and bills are paid the estate will have less than $150,000.00. The accounting petition was continued May 8, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for counsel to address in writing all of the issues raised in the probate examiners notes. If failure to do so occurs, sanctions in the amount of $25.00 per day will be imposed.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Continued To Apr-10-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Frangos for Sanra Geogleris and Demetra Pichinos (Administrators).

The Petition for Final Distribution was continued to April 10, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Frangos to file a responsive pleading addressing all of the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on November 21, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of A Status Report have not been filed. The status hearing was also continued to that date.
